Name: Gill Vance
Description: The leader & figure-head of the club, manages the conduct of branch affairs & the clubs public image.

Name: Andrew Taylor
Description: Responsible for the safety of the divers in the branch, approving all diving & training activities within the club & that it will meet the current BSAC standards.

Name: Raynor Manuel
Description: Responsible for ensuring the membership details and medical status is up to date & sending renewals to BSAC.

Name: Charles Collard
Description: Deals with membership/try dive enquiries & assists new members to become fully integrated with the club activities, training & social events.

Name: Mark Ridpath
Description: Plan the clubs training programme, co-ordinates the instructor team & ensures that training meets the current BSAC standards.

Name: Rachel Sharp
Description: Responsible for the administration of the club, organising committee meetings, AGMs & providing minutes.

Name: Thiery Thielens
Description: Responsible for the clubs shed, equipment, compressor & making sure it is serviced and accessible.

Name: Steve Batt
Description: Responsible for the clubs boats & trailers making sure they are serviced and accessible.

Name: John Hough
Description: Responsible for the financial management of the club funds. Banking money, paying expenses, maintaining books & the financial planning & budgeting.

Name: Sally Evans
Description: Responsible for ensuring the safety, wellbeing & inclusion of all members within the club.
